Verified by blob position analysis: blob center (125, 125) with radius 60 spans x:65-185, y:65-185. ROI [50-200, 50-200] fully contains the blob region.
Verified by blob position analysis: blob center (387, 125) with radius 60 spans x:327-447, y:65-185. ROI y:50-200 contains y-range, and x:312-462 contains x-range.
Verified by blob position analysis: blob center (256, 387) with radius 60 spans x:196-316, y:327-447. ROI y:312-462 contains y-range, and x:181-331 contains x-range.
Synthetic data generation produces donor blob max ~217 in raw image (background 10 + donor intensity 200). After correction should be ~0. Metadata value 10.0 matches neither interpretation.
Synthetic data generation produces acceptor blob max ~217 in raw image (background 10 + acceptor intensity 200). After correction should be ~0. Metadata value 10.0 matches neither interpretation.

Simulation shows corrected FRET signal mean ~41-50 depending on noise and ROI sampling. Verifier code uses SIGNAL_THRESHOLD = 50.0. Metadata value may be intended as success threshold rather than strict expected value.

privileged_info_summary: FRET sensitized emission task uses synthetic fluorescence microscopy data generated programmatically. The task implements spectral unmixing using correction coefficients beta=0.28 (donor bleed-through) and gamma=0.19 (acceptor cross-excitation), with the correction formula Corrected_FRET = Raw_FRET - (0.28 * Donor) - (0.19 * Acceptor). Three regions of interest are defined covering donor-only, acceptor-only, and FRET interaction regions, with verified ROI coordinates that properly encompass their corresponding synthetic blobs. The synthetic data comprises 512x512 pixel images with three labeled regions: donor blob (center 125,125), acceptor blob (center 387,125), and FRET interaction blob (center 256,387), each with radius 60 pixels. The correction should theoretically eliminate bleed-through (bringing donor and acceptor ROI values to ~0) while preserving true FRET signal (~100 in the interaction region). The metadata expected_values for donor and acceptor maxima (10.0) do not correspond to actual synthetic data ranges and appear to be either placeholder values or incorrectly specified.
